name: STEWART INFORMATION SERVICES CORP
business: Stewart is a customer-focused, global title insurance and real estate services company offering products and services through our direct operations, network of approved agencies and other companies within the Stewart family. The title segment includes title insurance and related services such as searching, examining, closing and insuring the condition of the title to real property. The real estate solutions segment provides credit and real estate information services, property preservation and field services, valuation management services, online notarization and closing solutions, and search services.
sellsTo: residential and commercial real estate professionals

exposures.sentence: Stewart is a customer-focused, global title insurance and real estate services company offering products and services through our direct operations, network of approved agencies and other companies within the Stewart family.
Stewart provides services to homebuyers and sellers, residential and commercial real estate professionals, mortgage lenders and servicers, title agencies, real estate attorneys and home builders.

Domestic commercial revenues in the fourth quarter 2025 improved by $32.0 million, or 38%, primarily driven by increased sizes of commercial closed transactions, principally related to data center and energy asset classes.

Innovation initiatives include implementing advanced technologies, use of artificial intelligence (AI), processes and techniques to automate and streamline certain manual processes during title search, insurance policy issuance and real estate transaction settlement to improve the manner and timeliness of delivering products and services, increase efficiency, reduce costs, improve product and service quality and customer experience, and enhance risk management.

Our IT systems and our vendors' IT systems are used to store and process sensitive information regarding our operations and financial position as well as any information pertaining to our customers and vendors.
